title: Leadership Boot Camp: Leading With Impact
subtitle: A practical leadership reset for managers who need clearer influence, accountability, and team direction.
whyThisMatters: Managers are often expected to lead before they have a reliable leadership toolkit. This workshop helps them turn intent into visible habits: clearer expectations, stronger conversations, better follow-through, and a steadier way to guide people through day-to-day pressure.
builtFor: Team leads who need practical people-management habits
walkAwayWith: Clarify what your team needs from you as a leader.
Communicate expectations without creating confusion or defensiveness.
Coach performance with practical, workplace-ready conversations.
Build personal action steps for leading with more consistency.

modules.title: Set Direction People Can Act On
Turn Leadership Intent Into Daily Practice

methodologyCaption: Short facilitator inputs are balanced with self-reflection, group work, and role-play so managers practise the conversations they will need back at work.
sourceDoc: course/documents/LEADERSHIP BOOT CAMP - LEADING WITH IMPACT.pdf
